business_ideas.idea: Gym Launch: Service filling boutique gyms with members for upfront cash
Acquisition.com: Buy and operate small businesses, using workshops as deal flow
Paid workshops ($5k) teaching founders acquisition process and founder skills
Direct-to-consumer brand (beverages, food, commerce) using demand generation
AI-powered health/weight loss platform using technology and personalization

predictions.text: Fitness industry will shift from gyms to appetite-control pills; boutique gym model won't work post-Ozempic
Founders must wait 18+ months for results; most fail by changing strategy too early out of impatience
